DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MITCHELL ENGINEERING'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: BILL McGAHAN, ESQUIRE (McINERNEY & DILLON, 510.465.7100) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT MITCHELL ENGINEERING. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES.
RULING: COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT HAS DEMONSTRATED THAT THE ALAMEDA ACTION INVOLVES THE SAME CLAIMS AND PARTIES AND WAS FILED IN ALAMEDA BEFORE THE CITY FILED THIS ACTION. THE CITY'S CLAIMS IN THIS CASE CONSTITUTE A MANDATORY CROSS-COMPLAINT WHICH MUST BE FILED IN RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT'S ALAMEDA COMPLAINT. THE REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE APPEARS TO BE UNNECESSARY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
